race.comment: DIVINE FIRE (2) showed good early speed then led into the straight when fresh from a spell last start before fighting on to finish second, beaten half a length, over 1350m at this track. She should be ready to peak third up and going to 1600m suits ideally from a low gate. FINE ACE (5) was a dominant winner over this route last time out to break the maiden by nearly four lengths. Clearly relished the trip there and can go on with it now. AFFAIRE VUE (11) will find this easier than a last start fifth at Morphettville over 1800m. Don't mind him back to a mile and  she'll be hard to get by on the quick turnaround. MORLAIX (9) doesn't boast the best winning strike rate but ran a nice race last time out, finishing second and beaten only 0.7 lengths over 1506m at Gawler.  She can figure on the quick backup. CASINO SHOWGIRL (6) hit the line fairly for fourth last time and is in the mix.
